mapper.sql: select s.id, s.user_id, s.content, s.images, s.image_file_ids, s.like_count, s.comment_count, s.collect_count, s.status, s.deleted, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, u.id as ref_user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar from b_say s left join b_user u on s.user_id = u.id
mapper.insert: insert into b_say (user_id, content, images, image_file_ids, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, status, deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{content}, #{images}, #{imageFileIds}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, ifnull(#{collectCount}, 0), #{status}, #{deleted}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update b_say set user_id = #{userId}, content = #{content}, images = #{images}, image_file_ids = #{imageFileIds}, like_count = #{likeCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, collect_count = ifnull(#{collectCount}, collect_count), status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: update b_say set deleted = 1, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}

update b_say set deleted = 1, update_time = sysdate() where id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update b_say set like_count = like_count + 1 where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update b_say set like_count = if(ifnull(like_count, 0) > 0, like_count - 1, 0) where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update b_say set comment_count = comment_count + 1 where id = #{id}
update b_say set collect_count = ifnull(collect_count, 0) + 1 where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update b_say set collect_count = if(ifnull(collect_count, 0) > 0, collect_count - 1, 0) where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
